meta.title: AoD Podcast | The Space Industry and Its Role in American Economic Security (feat. Ian Cinnamon)
meta.description: CEO of Apex, Ian Cinnamon, joins host Marshall Kosloff to detail the critical infrastructure backing the US space industry, and the national security implications of Americas increased interest and presence in space. With technological advancements driving space exploration and usefulness, Cinnamon explains how private and public partnerships will have to join forces to properly utilize this contested domain.
